waves.frame_eqs_str: a['t1']=Math.sin((a['time']*3)); a['t2']=Math.cos((a['time']*3)); a['t3']=Math.sin(div(a['time'],3)); a['t4']=Math.cos(div(a['time'],3)); a['t5']=Math.cos(div(a['time'],4)); a['ground']=below(a['t5'], -0.9); a['trig']=below(rand(100), 1); a['trig']=((a['trig']*bnot(a['ground']))*bnot(a['bird'])); a['bird']=(a['bird']*bnot(a['ground'])); a['bird']=(bnot(a['bird'])*a['trig']); a['t6']=a['bird'];
